audience_policies.source_phrase: Admits up to 4 people at $2.00 per person to any Mass Audubon Wildlife Sanctuary. This includes access to Drumlin Farm, both a working farm and wildlife sanctuary. MONDAYS: many paid sanctuaries are closed. Please check the hours of your intended destination before booking.
